THE ARCHITECTURAL PIVOT: FROM LLM AGGREGATOR TO VERTICAL UTILITY

The "DeAI Summer" of 2026 is currently obsessed with numbers, 200+ models, 34k agents, etc. But if you're only looking at the quantity
replyText: the shift from generalist to specialist agents is huge. Medical audit and legal compliance agents with on-ch 🚀 ain reputation could actually transform how enterprises adopt AI. The verifiable layer is what makes this trustless.

replyText:
This is a solid breakdown.
 The unified API approach really stood out to me - dealing with different model integrations is such a pain point right now.
 How does the routing handle edge cases where the 'best' provider is offline mid-request?
